content:
I'm continuing work from a previous session. Here's the structured context:

<context>
<summary>Session about database setup with SQLAlchemy and Alembic. Covered User and Task models, migration strategy, and input validation with Pydantic.</summary>

<decisions>
  <decision>Use SQLAlchemy 2.0 mapped_column style</decision>
  <decision>Use Alembic with autogenerate for migrations</decision>
  <decision>No soft delete for MVP</decision>
</decisions>

<tasks>
  <task status="pending">Add indexes on email and status columns</task>
  <task status="pending">Create initial migration</task>
  <task status="pending">Add error handling middleware</task>
</tasks>

<open_questions>
  <question>Should we add pagination to the task listing endpoint?</question>
</open_questions>

<entities>
  <entity type="technology">SQLAlchemy</entity>
  <entity type="technology">Alembic</entity>
  <entity type="technology">Pydantic</entity>
  <entity type="file">models.py</entity>
</entities>

<code_context>
  <snippet language="python">
    class User(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'users'
    id: Mapped[int] = mapped_column(primary_key=True)
  </snippet>
</code_context>

</context>

Please review this context and help me continue. Focus on the outstanding tasks and open questions.
